$sessionId..read: auth != null && (auth.uid === data.child('meta/controllerUid').val() || auth.uid === data.child('meta/deviceAuthUid').val() || auth.uid === data.child('meta/ownerUid').val())
$sessionId..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === data.child('meta/controllerUid').val() || auth.uid === data.child('meta/deviceAuthUid').val() || auth.uid === newData.child('meta/controllerUid').val() || auth.uid === newData.child('meta/deviceAuthUid').val() || auth.uid === newData.child('meta/ownerUid').val())
